name: sigflare
description: Minimal TypeScript event collector that writes raw PV events to ClickHouse.

scripts.dev: pnpm dlx concurrently -k --names tracker-build,tracker-static,worker "vite build -c vite.tracker.config.ts --watch" "pnpm dlx http-server dist/tracker -p 8788 -c-1" "pnpm dlx wrangler dev src/index.ts"
scripts.build: vite build -c vite.config.ts && vite build -c vite.tracker.config.ts
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run build && pnpm dlx wrangler deploy
